creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Don’t skip this market in London 🇬🇧

Leadenhall Market in the City of London is one of the most beautiful markets in the British capital.

It’s quite remarkable as it’s surrounded by skyscrapers here in 2024, but it’s a historic spot with some cool shops, pubs and restaurants.

I love getting a pint at the Lamb Tavern, sitting outside (which is inside the market) and just people-watch for a bit 😎

Combine your visit to Leadenhall Market with a visit to either Horizon 22 or the Sky Garden, which are both nearby:  These are two of the best free viewing platforms in London, but you must pre-book a time slot, and they do “sell out” quite fast, so make sure you book them as soon as you know when you’ll be in London 🤓

You’ve also got cool spots like St Dunstan in the East and the Monument to the Great Fire of London nearby ✌️  MORE LONDON TRAVEL TIPS 👇  I’ve created a map with all my top London recommendations that I’ve gathered by exploring London in the past 15 years 🤓 
Send me a DM that says “Londonmap” and I’ll send you the link directly. There’s also a link in my profile ✌️  #london #londontravel #thingstodoinlondon #leadenhallmarket
